def: Of or pertaining to a finger or toe, or to the claw of aninsect crustacean.
One who caters.The little fowls in the air have God for Their provider and caterer.Shelton.
A mode of facing sea walls and embankments with planks drivenas piles and secured by ties. Knight.
The quality of being roundabout; circuitousness.
One of a class of strongly basic substances derived fromammonia by replacement of one or more hydrogen atoms by a basic atomor radical.
Swiftly. [Obs. or Poetic] Shak.Ply swift and strong the oar. Southey.
One who dogmatizes; a bold asserter; a magisterial teacher.Hammond.
An elector or chooser; one of two persons appointed by a courtto return a jury or serve a writ when the sheriff and the coronersare disqualified.
A feasting at taverns. [Obs.] "The misrule of our tavernings."Bp. Hall.
